'''Korgath''' was a [[Taloron]] infiltrator agent for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Biography==
Kogath was a former member of the [[Taloron Hunters]] when he joined the Alliance, he became a member of the [[Scandium Team]].

Korgath was considered the luckiest Scandium, because he survived many high-risk situations.

During the [[Wellte-ir Massacre]], Korgath was one of the six survivors of the Scandium Team. After that, the Scandium Team was dismantled, and Korgath continued to do field work for the Alliance.

==Personality and traits==
Korgath had a reputation for being hard and cold, although close acquaintances found him to be very warm and personable. He worked at maintaining his reputation of having a bad attitude, often starting [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] brawls over minor incidents. He was considered very lucky.
